description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-story structure with a prominent front facade that includes a balcony with glass railings. The exterior combines dark and light wall finishes, with the front yard enclosed by a white stone wall and a metal gate. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered carport on the left side, and a landscaped garden area with circular stepping stones and green grass. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed across the building, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear and side elevations are more subdued, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of open and enclosed spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, glass balconies, and a landscaped front yard enclosed by a white stone wall. The exterior features a mix of dark and light finishes, large windows, and a covered carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass balcony, landscaped yard, white stone wall, and driveway with carport.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dark exterior wall, minimal windows, and the continuation of the driveway and yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat roof, grouped windows, and the back of the balcony, with less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side yard, white stone wall, and a partial view of the balcony and carport.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
